10636224.title: Voice of a Killer Special: The Colonel
10636224.description: Colonel Russell Williams is one of the deadliest murderers the UK has ever known. Yet, because he committed his crimes in Canada, few people have heard of him. This is his story.

10636973.title: Judge Judy
10636973.description: An ex-convict with children by two women is called to the stand to testify when they sue each other over slashed tyres and an alleged assault at a gas station.

10637055.title: Cheaters
10637055.description: Chuck's wife complains of needing more space and moves out - but is there another reason for her exit? Ann finds evidence of her boyfriend's infidelity in his car.

10638015.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10638015.description: Investigating the life and crimes of Richard Chase, also known as the Vampire of Sacramento.

10638958.title: Judge Judy
10638958.description: A woman sues her younger boyfriend for the balance on a vehicle that he totaled. Then, ex-lovers fight over custody, a car crash and an assault and a brother and sister want their late mother's money.

10639039.title: Judge Judy
10639039.description: Gamblers fight over slot machine winnings and a woman claims her truck was illegally repossessed. Then, two women accuse their roommate of stealing and not paying bills.

10639899.title: Judge Judy
10639899.description: Troubles with a vehicle divide a man and his fiancee's sister. Then, a co-worker sues a teen for rent and utilities.

10639959.title: Something's Killing Me
10639959.description: Jeanna Giese complains to her parents that she's fatigued and has numbness in her arm. Doctors speculate that it might be Lyme disease or West Nile, but what Jeanna has is far more sinister.

10640908.title: Operation Repo
10640908.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10641016.title: Operation Repo
10641016.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10641883.title: Judge Judy
10641883.description: A man says a woman assaulted him on their first date; a horse's new owner accuses the seller of false advertisement and stops paying.

10641969.title: Judge Judy
10641969.description: Two women sue their ex-boyfriends for repayment of loans.

10642086.title: Extreme Salvage Squad
10642086.description: Team Salvage is attempting to pull a damaged ship out of the mangrove jungle in one piece, as its owners are determined to keep it and repair it.

10643046.title: Dog and Beth: On the Hunt
10643046.description: Dog faces his feelings about a past arrest that changed his life. Meanwhile, Beth attempts to stop the team from cursing and a look at the techniques of fugitive recovery.

10644017.title: Close Calls: On Camera
10644017.description: A top British surfer rides the wave of his life, but then it all goes wrong. Also, two little girls call for help when their dad collapses, and a mum and daughter suddenly find their tumble dryer on fire.

10644099.title: Operation Repo
10644099.description: Viewers get to ride along with a team of highly-trained professionals from California's San Fernando Valley as they repossess cars ... no matter how angry the owners may get. The stories depicted are based on real events.

10645058.title: Paranormal Survivor
10645058.description: A man shares his story of a monster attack. The story of a couple who experienced violent paranormal activity. Holly shares her story of being haunted be her ex-husband's ghost.

10646030.title: Judge Judy
10646030.description: Ex-lovers' fight involves flying fish-tanks and a cinder block thrown through a window.

10646117.title: Judge Judy
10646117.description: An ex-roommate sues for illegal eviction, property damage and assault.

10646962.title: Judge Judy
10646962.description: A woman thinks she does not have to repay a friend for loans for clothes, rent and car insurance.

10648122.description: Florida college student Lindsey Meyer and Michigan E.M.T Kevin Nesbit both come down with a painful sore throat. What seem like symptoms of a common cold, soon spiral into a life or death situation.

10650071.title: Judge Judy
10650071.description: Former friends feud, a partygoer accuses another of kicking a car.

10650918.description: A woman sues her ex-flatmates for rent, and a woman sues her parents for the value of a car loan and unpaid personal loans.

10656090.title: World's Most Evil Killers
10656090.description: Delve into the sordid minds of some of the most notorious murderers on the planet.

10657008.title: Cheaters
10657008.description: Nina worries that her producer boyfriend is making music with another woman. Angie wants to know why her husband is always texting.

10657986.title: Fame Kills
10657986.description: The case of an aspiring actress who beat out hundreds of women to win the starring role in a feature film, but is then found murdered.
